message:
fix(core): fix url_encode_path_segment, normalize root_path, deduplicate constant_time_eq (bd-uz2s)

- url_encode_path_segment now actually preserves forward slashes (was
  identical to url_encode, contradicting its documentation)
- AppConfig::root_path() strips trailing slashes for consistency with
  UrlRegistry::with_root_path
- constant_time_str_eq in error.rs now delegates to the canonical
  constant_time_eq in password.rs instead of duplicating it

Regression tests for url_encode and root_path normalization added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
